steps: Go to https://app.beehiiv.com and log in to your Beehiiv account
Under 'Workspace Settings', click the 'API' section (or navigate to Settings > Integrations)
In the 'API Keys' section, click 'Create New API Key'
Enter a name for the key and confirm creation
Copy the API key immediately — it is only shown once
Use the key as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_key>' in your API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Beehiiv API key, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_key>'

notes: API key is shown only once at creation — copy it before leaving the page
You must be a workspace Owner or Admin to create API keys
Most endpoints require a publication_id in the URL path — find it in Settings or via the publications_list endpoint
Free plan available; paid plans unlock advanced features
Rate limits apply — check the Beehiiv developer docs for current limits

test_endpoint.description: List all publications associated with your API key
